Articles tagged #philosophy

3 articles

  • AI Use Philosophy

    2026-03-19

    Be unapologetic about using AI. Show how it facilitates learning as a primary objective — with the solved problem as a side effect.

  • The Frictional CTO

    2026-03-09

    I kill the vibes so the software could live a healthy life. Unlike a fractional CTO, the frictional CTO's value is precisely the friction itself.

  • The Mile Metaphor

    2026-02-04

    I think the main goal of AI is to help us maintain stealth while we keep adding mileage between us and our problems.
